acquisition method: The acquisition was performed in data-independent mode (DIA)
alkylation reagent: alkylation was executed with 10 μL of 200 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digestion was performed with trypsin for both the cells and the extracellular vesicles
fragmentation method: the ions were fragmented for each MS/MS experiment in the collision cell using the rolling collision energy
instrument: coupled directly to an Orbitrap Exploris 480
